title: @heygurisingh: 10 GitHub repos so good they shouldn't be free. 1. AutoHedge An autonomous hedge fund built in Python with four AI agent
summary: @heygurisingh: 10 GitHub repos so good they shouldn't be free. 1. AutoHedge An autonomous hedge fund built in Python with four AI agent
whyItMatters: 10 GitHub repos so good they shouldn't be free. 1. AutoHedge An autonomous hedge fund built in Python with four AI agents: a director generates investment theses, a quant validates them, a risk manager decides position size, and an execution agent places orders. Operates live on Solana. With 'pip install -U autohedge', you can start trading immediately. rep…
